pr.title: Record: Fused MLP (Triton+CUTLASS EVT) + Fast Causal N-Gram Tilt & Subword Certainty (3-seed mean)

output.summary: Fuses Triton/CUTLASS MLP kernels with all-int6 GPTQ and a GPU causal n-gram tilt acting as sparse auxiliary memory for single-pass eval.
techniques: Triton TMA forward + CUTLASS EVT backward MLP fusion with precomputed act_grad
Full Hessian GPTQ to keep 66 layers in int6 under 16MB
Causal n-gram tilt as sparse auxiliary memory with fast C++ hash + GPU tilt
